name: The Locksmith
description: AlterU After Dark FMV v3 第 5 作 — 凌晨 3:40 你是 24h 应急锁匠被叫到老破公寓, 30s 陌生女人说自己反锁在屋外, 但她身后的门从里面是开的. 5 分钟单一封闭场景 (走廊 + 玄关), 3 层选择 (信疑 / 进退 / 推撤), 8 个结局 (4 sensual 廉价密会 + 4 horror 真实犯罪). 全写实寄存器 — 真人 / 真实伤害 / 真实同伙, 无超自然. 视觉血脉 painterly indie game illustration + AlterU 品牌粉紫 palette. 一次走完 30-40s.

name: The Midnight Dinner
description: AlterU After Dark V1 框架 — 单一场景 + 5 hotspot + 1 ending. 一间红绒幕的私人餐厅, 长桌远端坐着一个黑人女剪影; 你这一头桌面散着 5 件物事: 中学笔记本 / 咖啡杯 / 红酒杯 / 烟灰缸 / 银锁. 每件物事属于一个不同年龄的你 (18 / 25 / 32 / 40 / 50). 点物事 → 那个年龄的你出现说一句话. 5 句说完, 远端剪影站起来沿桌走过来 — 走到面前时已经是 50 岁的你. 视觉血脉 Frank Miller Sin City B&W + 红 accent. 一次走完 1-2 分钟.

name: The Audition
description: AlterU After Dark FMV v3 第 4 作 — The Photographer 续集。Lin Wei 那批照片流出来六个月后, 22 岁波兰俄裔新模特 Elena Novak 带着你拍 Lin Wei 的样张来你的同一个 cyclorama 棚试镜, 想让你拍她拍出同样的感觉。她带了她自己的白色 silk slip dress (Lin Wei 是黑色)。3 层选择, 8 结局 (4 sensual + 4 horror) — 她可能是 Lin Wei 的 FIT 室友, 也可能她身上有 Lin Wei 同样的疤、知道 Lin Wei 你私下拍但没人见过的那一帧。视觉血脉同前作 Steven Klein.

name: House of the Moon
description: AlterU After Dark FMV v3 第 3 作 — 1920s 横滨, 你是住在山手洋館里的不老主人, 22 岁日本女作家 Kirie 在雷雨夜带着关于你的手稿来到你的书房. 5 分钟一次烛光对谈, 3 层选择, 8 个结局 (3 sensual + 5 全超现实 horror). 视觉血脉 Yoshitaka Amano / Vampire Hunter D / Belladonna of Sadness — 80s 哥特 anime, 紫电雷雨 + 烛火金 + 紫绛深红. 极少对白, 张力在选择 + 等待 + 一个不该在的细节. 一次走完 30-40s.

name: The Couturier
description: AlterU After Dark FMV v3 第 2 作 — 你是巴黎 atelier 高定裁缝, 28 岁华裔准新娘 Yu Han 婚礼前 6 天最后一次试衣, 半成品奶白 muslin 钉在她身上. 5 分钟一次最后调整, 3 层选择, 8 个结局. 三面镜是天然 horror 装置 — 偶尔有一面会不对劲. 视觉血脉 Helmut Newton b&w + 微 tungsten 暖 undertone. 视频不切场, 选项浮在尾帧上点击直接进下一段. 一次走完 30-40s.

name: The Photographer
description: AlterU After Dark FMV v3 第 1 作 — 决策树短分支实验。你是时装摄影师, 25 岁华裔美国女模 Lin Wei 站在 cyclorama 上等你指导. 5 分钟的私人拍摄, 3 层选择, 8 个结局 (4 sensual + 4 wrong). 视频之间不切场不展示标题 — 视频停在尾帧, 选项浮在画面上, 点击直接进下一段. 视觉血脉 Steven Klein editorial fashion + Helmut Newton 暗光. 极简对白, 张力在 gaze + 距离 + 一个不该在那的痕迹. 一次走完 25-40s.

name: Late Check-in
description: AlterU After Dark FMV v3 第 6 作 — 凌晨 3 点你是出差住进中端酒店的男人, 房间里有个早三十、利落黑色齐下巴 bob + 齐刘海、灰眸、穿白色 satin 吊带的女人坐在床沿。第一人称 POV, 单一封闭场景, 5 分钟, 3 层选择 (走近她 / 拿起电话; 触碰 / 镜子; 空床窗影 / 墙裂), 8 个结局 (3 sensual + 5 全超现实 horror)。全超现实寄存器 — 镜中无脸倒影 / 空白面具 / 墙缝伸手 / 窗内尖叫脸 / 无限复制走廊, 每个恐怖都是明确异象。视觉血脉 painterly indie illustration + AlterU 粉紫 palette (#F5B1C7 + #7700A1)。视频不切场, 选项浮在尾帧点击直接进下一段。一次走完 30-40s.

name: AlterU Press · Almanac
description: AlterU Press 工具化系列第 02 号 · Almanac (历书)。每天打开一页今日历书 — 农历 / 干支 / 节气 / 日月升落 / 宜忌 / 历史上的今天 / 编辑短语。日期数据全平台共享, 每日 hero 插图按 19 世纪自然史风格生成 (节气物候 + 月相), 每个用户给当天盖一句一行的章, 章在墙上跟其他用户的混合排列。文化基底走中式黑历 + 西式 astronomy + AlterU 宇宙虚构事件混排。

name: Mykonos Five Days
description: 雅典转机偶遇 4 年没见的 Yale 同学, 一时兴起退了机票去 Mykonos 待 5 天。28 岁建筑师 Lena 和 28 岁摄影师 Sam, 两个华裔美国人, 两人都单身, 但都不打算谈恋爱 — 至少这趟旅行前是。5 个场景 (抵达 / 沙滩 / 餐厅 / 风车午夜 / 早晨码头), 每场景 2 选, 4 个结局基于「接近度」累积。视觉血脉 Call Me By Your Name + Lost in Translation + La Piscine. 极少对白, 张力在 gaze + gesture + distance. AlterU After Dark FMV v2 第 2 作 — 当代实验作。

name: AlterU Press · Field Guide
description: AlterU Press 工具化系列第 01 号 · Field Guide。拍下身边任何普通物件 — 一顶帽子, 一个茶壶, 一个皮包 — 工具识别物体, 拆出它的部位结构, 找出全世界 6-8 种文化变体, 写一段民族志小评论, 重新画一张 19 世纪自然史标本卡。最后输出 1080×1920 的说明书海报, 可分享 / 收藏 / 发到 feed。社交墙横向陈列所有用户的标本, 每张可点开看作者主页。Editorial 杂志说明书风格, 偏向文化解说而非数据分析。

name: The Bidding
description: 1991 年 1 月 8 日晚 8 点, Bucharest 第 6 区。Ceaușescu 处决一年后的国家在散架, 停电是常态, 这一夜电只有 11 PM 之前。38 岁寡妇 Elena Marin 为 11 岁先天心脏病的女儿 Paula 通过黑市掮客约了 4 个买家来家里出价 — 美国黑医生 / 前 Securitate 大队长 / 前 KGB / 罗马尼亚还俗神父。每个人卖的不只是心脏。Mid-pivot: Paula 不是 Elena 亲生的, 1980 Polizu 妇产医院 Stefan 神父把她和加州一户精英家庭的女儿调包了。5 个章节, 6 个结局, 每个选择改变 (caution, truth_accepted, mercy, time_left) 四维状态。AlterU After Dark FMV 系列升级版首作。

name: Dispatch
description: 1994 年 11 月凌晨 3 点 47 分, 芝加哥市紧急通讯中心 (OEMC) 地下层 PSAP-12 调度台。Marcus Heath, 38, 非裔, 警员编号 4471, 晋身夜班第 6 小时一通电话都没接到。CRT 屏幕上显示 5 条未听的语音留言, 都是不同陌生人 911 报警, 讲今晚芝加哥各个角落都遇到一个崩溃的男人。点 5 条留言听完。Climax: 第 6 条是 Marcus 本人 30 天前在他太太 Charlene 在厨房中风死亡那晚打的 911, 30 天后的他终于接起来。完全没有人脸的 FMV — 整张画面是发磷绿色 CRT 终端机, 波形 + GPS 点 + 终端字。AlterU After Dark FMV 系列第 7 作。

name: Final Stream
description: 2024 周二晚 9 点, Long Beach 单间公寓。24 岁韩裔美国 Twitch 主播 Riley Park (rileyontheradio) 直播了第 4 小时, 8.2K 在线。她没告诉粉丝今晚是最后一场。点她桌上 5 件东西 (粉色 Stanley / 妹妹的拍立得 / 裱起来的第一笔 1 美元打赏 / 趴着的手机 / 直播镜头里的脸) 听她说话。Climax: 她读出 MarcusM 的弹幕, 关掉笔记本。框架同 Setting the Table, 但故意拒绝电影感——伪纪录片质感, 2024 真实主播桌面。两层声线 (亮的主播声 / 真的疲惫声) 全程交替。AlterU After Dark FMV 系列第 6 作。

name: Setting the Table
description: 1988 年 6 月 14 日, Brookline 郊外, 蓝调时刻。71 岁退休英语教师 Eleanor 给两个人摆桌, 像她丈夫 Walter 还在。今晚是他离开的第 207 天 — 但她不允许自己承认。点桌上 5 件物件 (他缺口的咖啡杯 / 老花眼镜 / 海军 cashmere / 银叉的位置 / 全家福), 听她对着空椅子说话。Climax: 她妹妹 Maggie 打电话来。她拒绝。她照旧摆桌。Joan Didion 的《Year of Magical Thinking》 文学血脉。AlterU After Dark FMV 系列, 精雕细琢卷的一作。

name: Replicant Wake
description: 2089 高端定制陪伴 replicant 在化妆台前度过她'第一次成为人'的午夜。5 个全息物件,5 段她说出口的台词。她不知道——每句话都是别人记忆的复制。Climax 让你选她接下来变成谁。AlterU After Dark FMV 第 2 作。

name: The Confession
description: 1962 巴黎 Saint-Roch 教堂晚 9 点。红丝绒大衣的女人对栅栏低语 5 件罪行,半法半英,像在引诱不是告解。第 5 件结束后你输入自己的罪——神父用她的声音回你。AlterU After Dark FMV 第 3 作。

name: Boy Next Door
description: 1986 年 8 月 Iowa,午后 3:42。34 岁主妇站在厨房窗前看新邻居家儿子推剪她的草坪。每次你点窗台,就是她又看了一次。Climax:他抬头,对她笑——他知道她看了一下午。AlterU After Dark FMV 第 4 作。

name: Last Cigarette
description: 1956 芝加哥蓝丝绒爵士俱乐部, 11:42 PM。Mira Lane 是头牌歌女, 也是 Rocco Bellini 两年的情妇。今晚她登台前 18 分钟, 你点她化妆台上的五样东西—— 香烟、马提尼、口红、珍珠、镜中的眼神—— 每一下都是一段她说出口的台词、一段她做过的小事。听完五段, Showtime 的红边斜体浮起。点它, 镜头停在她离开的椅子上, 抽屉里的设单慢慢摊开: 'For Mr. R. Bellini, on the 18th anniversary of his marriage.' 她不是在等他, 她是在卸下他。AlterU After Dark FMV 系列首作。

name: The Bell Tower
description: A dim cathedral bell tower. A thick bronze bell hangs from a wood beam. You get one pull on the rope per day. Drag the rope down, release — the bell swings, BONG carries across a 6-second decay. After your ring the rope dims and won't budge again until tomorrow. The ticker shows who else has rung today; their pulls travel through your tower as faint distant bongs. When the platform crosses 100 rings in a day, every still-open client hears a quiet collective chime — the tower rang for the world today. AlterU daily-ritual series.

name: Bubble Wrap, Eternal
description: Endless plastic bubble wrap. Tap to pop — pitch-randomized chirp, satisfying splash, the next row is already calling. Every eighth pop, the bubble doesn't just pop — it drops a tiny paper fortune slip in deadpan-absurd voice ("the third stair from the top will remember you all week"). Slips collect in your pocket and join Today's Slips wall — see what other people popped open. Today's pop count is shown for the whole planet. AlterU sensory series.

name: Static Channel
description: An old CRT television. Drag across the screen to tune up and down the FM band — 88.0 to 108.0 MHz. Each frequency is its own AI-broadcast channel: a single weird VHS still and a one-line chyron caption — your mom rolling dumplings in 1994, a wedding from 1987 where nobody is dancing, test patterns for towns that no longer exist. Hit the heart to keep a channel; open the wall to see what other people pulled in tonight. AlterU sensory series.

name: Pebble Pocket
description: One stone a day. Press the sand on the beach and the tide brings back a single AI-generated pebble — quartz, amber, slate, jasper, whatever surfaces. Come back tomorrow for another. Pure daily ritual, no scoring, just a slowly-filling pocket. AlterU sensory series.

name: Ink of Fate
description: An old biker tattoo artist takes one look at you and decides the tattoo you were always going to get. Show your face, answer one question, and the parlor stamps a fate-piece onto cheek / throat / jawline / behind ear — Sailor Jerry, irezumi, stick-and-poke, blackwork. AI reads it back to you: design + meaning + verdict. $200, pay at the door. Tonight's Parlor wall holds the last clients. AlterU After Dark 系列。

name: Frost Crystals
description: Touch the cold glass and a six-fold snowflake grows from your finger — drag to steer the branches, hold still to let it bloom. Multiple flakes can coexist; slow thaw means the glass slowly clears between sessions. Pure sensory toy — AlterU sensory series.

name: Ferrofluid
description: A magnet in your finger. Drag the pool and watch the black metal pull into spikes, chasing your touch. Pure sensory toy — no scoring, no winning, just shiny. AlterU sensory series.

name: Pulp Hour
description: Six beats. One sitting. Pick a pulp magazine cover — All-Night Operator / The Tenant in 4B / Voyager 9 / Last Train Home — and an AI ghostwriter spins a 6-beat noir around your choices. Three options each beat (Defy · Yield · Lie); ending beat returns an illustrated finished cover with your byline. Mail it to the newsstand for other readers. AlterU After Dark 系列。

name: Tap & Tell · Vertical
description: Tap a frame, tell what happens next — vertical 3:4 cinematic continuation. AlterU 系列 v2.0 — full social loop with TikTok-style swipeable wall.

name: Vital Signs
description: Night shift. You're the only one awake. A friend from your contacts has crashed in the dream-ER — keep their pulse on the beat with one finger. Hit the rhythm of a slowly-drifting BPM target; too slow flatlines them, too fast tips them into V-fib. When they go, AI types a deadpan death certificate + a morgue-tag portrait stamps onto the Fate Wall. Save them and they post-mortem-thank you. AlterU After Dark 系列。

name: Kiss Wall
description: v2.7 — 纯黑屏幕里藏着一个看不见的形状 — 骸骨 / 解剖心脏 / 古典雕像 / 泪眼 / 伸手 / 玫瑰 / 面纱 / 羽翼 之一，每次随机抽。点中藏的轮廓 → 真实唇印留下 + mwah ASMR；点空地 → 唇印一闪即消。吻得越多形状越浮现。封印 → AI 刻意大利体碑文 → 上传全员碑墙。墙上点别人的碑可看详情 + 三种反应（哀悼/陪坐/献花）。AlterU After Dark 系列。

name: Tap & Tell
description: Pick an opening scene — a cabin in the snow, a figure on an empty beach, a city street at night. Tap somewhere in the frame, say what happens next. AI paints the next moment and stitches it into a 5-second cinematic clip you can keep. Single-beat story toy. AlterU 系列。

name: Botfish
description: 约会软件 parody，但你要找出 AI 生成的假照片。每张资料卡片都是 AI 生成的人像 — 大部分看着像真人，但部分藏着明显破绽：6 根手指、塑料皮肤、阴影方向不对、卡通小鬼从胳膊里冒出来、电线杆穿过身体。右滑（LIKE）真人 → +10 配对；左滑（NOPE）识破 AI → +20 抓 bot。但一旦右滑到 AI 照片 → 立即游戏结束，被骗了。Hinge 风酒粉香菜配色 + 黄色 ♥ 按钮。AlterU After Dark 系列。

name: Corner Office
description: Doodle Jump 职场升迁噩梦。拖动一只匿名西装男往上爬办公塔——办公桌、转椅、立会圆毯、康普茶弹簧塔。捡拿铁加速、股票背心（挡一次崩溃）、Adderall（火箭跳）；躲红色「崩溃」气泡（掉 3 层）。爬到顶层 100 = EXECUTIVE LIFETIME ACHIEVEMENT，棺材打开。屏幕越往上越红，电梯背景音乐穿插着 3-5 秒沉默。AlterU After Dark 系列。

name: Crack Tap
description: A risk-and-reward fortune crystal ball. Press & hold and a fracture network spiders across the orb — the deeper you dare (Whisper → Vision → Revelation → the Brink), the rarer the omen you can draw. Release to lock the reading: a fortune from Tarot, Oracle Bone or Rune lore, the crack pattern itself the sign. Push past the brink and it shatters into a Shattered Vision — blazing glory or dust. Realistic crystal, Voronoi break, singing-bowl reveal.

name: Farm to Table
description: Swipe to slice through the farm — cartoon pig, cow, chicken, sheep and duck heads arc up from below; drag your finger through them in one continuous motion and they split in half, revealing a thick pink ham cross-section with bone in the middle. Chain hits in one swipe for combo multipliers (×2, ×3, MULTI, MASSIVE). Wagyu A5 cubes are golden bonus +100. The red 'no-cleaver' sign is the bomb — slash it and the run ends.

name: Tidal Survive
description: Stack tiles, dodge sharks, outrun the rising tide. The water level rises every 5 seconds on an 8×8 sand grid — pick up planks (+1), boulders (+2, slow carry) or paddles (+5s buffer) and stack them under your feet. Stay too long in the water and the circling sharks will lunge. Endless mode + Aigram leaderboard.

name: Liquid Drop
description: Tap to bloom — drops of color bloom across the canvas, overlap, and slowly fade. Three liquids through the glass: oil beads with glossy highlights on a midnight pool, cream blooming into coffee, vivid acrylic paint mixing on black. Each tap rings a new pentatonic note.

name: Murmuration
description: Drag to gather the flock — your finger is the attractor, a swarm of birds / fireflies / dandelion seeds chases it, swirls into shape, then disperses when you let go. Three scenes: starlings at dusk, fireflies in the forest, dandelion seeds in the spring meadow.

name: Sumo King
description: Mecha sumo over a lava pit. 1v3 in a 60-second bout on a steel deck with cyan + magenta neon rims. Hold the joystick to charge plasma, release to ram opponents into the lava. Three AI archetypes (rookie / bruiser / sniper) and a hot/cool palette set this apart from the penguin-rink edition.

name: Lantern
description: Explore a dark cave by lantern light. Pick up 4 crystal types — red grows your halo, green is a 5s flood, blue is a wall, gold scores. Monsters lurk just past the light; linger in the dark and a dark-hand swipe ends the run.

name: Frosted Window
description: Drag to wipe the steam — fast swipe = thin line, slow drag = wide brush, hold still to fatten. Six scenes through the glass: vanity mirror, rainy neon city, winter cabin, aquarium, sunset palms, cherry blossom. Live drips + ambient pads + your lifetime wipe count.

name: Penguin Sumo
description: 1v3 ice-rink push battle — hold the stick to charge, release to body-slam. Knock all 3 rival sumo penguins off the dohyō, or survive the 60-second bout. Three AI personalities (rookie / bruiser / sniper) keep every match different

name: Beat Drop
description: Pull the crowd — DJ silhouette + flashlight in a dark club. Lead same-color dancers to the matching stage door, dodge bouncers, MIC DROP to stun them. Dual-gate sort, combo multiplier, sweeping techno lights, 128 BPM 4-on-the-floor BGM

name: Pied Piper
description: Whistle up the chain — 牧羊犬把同色羊带进对的圈门，狼会撞散队伍，按 BARK 把狼吓晕。双门同时分拣，连对涨倍率，关卡和狼随之加多

name: Alter Isle Mini
description: Tap to build — Alter Isle 的手机精简版，35 个素材底部 dock，长按擦除，双指缩放，自动保存。一指 = 全部

name: Alter Isle
description: A sandbox for your alter self — 等距方块小岛建造，教堂、风车、橄榄树和小巷自由摆，无目标无计分，AlterU 调色板下的禅意创意玩具

name: Penguin Rescue
description: Save the babies. Dodge the skua. — 摇杆拖动母企鹅穿过浮冰，把走失小企鹅一只只接成长龙；天上的南极贼鸥会朝你俯冲，碰一下就 game over

name: Slap Cam
description: Swipe to slap — 划过角色脸抽飞 6 个 AlterU 头颅，X 眼连击，30 秒卡通乱斗配马戏团 oompa BGM

name: Sand Mandala
description: Draw a kaleidoscopic sand mandala with 4/6/8/12-fold symmetry. Frame your work or long-press the center to dissolve it — the dissolution becomes the seed of the next one.

name: Meow Machine
description: Tap. Cats sing. — 8 cats × 8 steps, three moods (NAP / PARTY / ZOOMIES), one shuffle button, zero training required

name: Rhythm Machine
description: Tap the grid, make a beat — 8 instruments × adjustable 4–32 steps, 7 genre presets that auto-fit, and an AI prompt to spit out a starting groove

name: Magnet Drop
description: Same color chains — 拖手指出一个磁铁,卷走同色粒子,串得越长爆得越响。换色?直接戳那颗就行,磁铁会自动重新调色

name: Tiny Farm
description: Build · Tend · Watch — 8×8 体素小岛自由摆放 12 种工具，牛羊鸡自走，5 分钟一天的昼夜更替，云影/烟囱/风吹草动

name: Stack
description: Time the tap — 候选块在塔顶滑动，点屏幕落下，没对齐的部分切掉飞落。完美对齐能让塔重新长粗、combo 累积爆奖。

name: Iron Filings
description: Touch the field — 手指就是磁极，铁屑被吸成一坨。快点一下爆出连环冲击波，长按 0.5 秒钉一颗常驻磁铁，摆出经典磁感线雕塑

name: Atomic
description: One tap, big bang — 屏幕上漂浮的原子，点一下引爆核心，链式反应能跑多远全看你选的点。爆链越久爆炸圈越大，雪球停不下来

name: Layer Pop
description: Pop your fun — 1000 层霓虹圈嵌套，拖拽对齐缺口让小球穿透，连过 3 关进入 FEVER MODE，玻璃碎裂的爽片

name: Lava Lamp
description: 熔岩灯 — 蜡块在油里慢慢漂浮，点击瓶身加热让蜡上升；三种主题：经典橙、Y2K 紫、生物荧光蓝

name: Aurora
description: 极光 — 触摸夜空，柔光帘随手指流淌，三种夜色：极地翠绿、暮粉霞紫、午夜深蓝

name: Bubble Wrap
description: 气泡膜 — 戳爆每一颗都会回弹补充，三种主题：星云、蜂蜜、彩虹皂泡

name: Wind Chime
description: 風鈴 — 月下庭院、轻拨铜管的五声音律，无目标、无计分

name: Marbles
description: 重力沙盒 — 同色合并爆裂、连击奖励彩虹雨，倾斜改重力、摇晃即弹跳

name: Snowglobe
description: 雪球 — 玻璃球内三种夜：冬夜松林、樱花夕暮、宇宙漂流；摇晃成雪、倾斜成风，时刻 · 月相 · 诗句在脚下流转

name: Hourglass
description: 沙漏 — 沙粒一颗颗从颈口漏下，上腔自漏斗、下腔堆成锥；空了自动翻转。三种调：撒哈拉暖金、紫水晶、深海生物荧光

name: Depthy
description: 谁偷了画？— 罗生门式悬疑问话，四个嫌疑人，五种结局

name: LEXICON
description: 语言有重力 — 在滚动的文字流中捕获词语，构建连锁评分机器

name: Agent String
description: 语义空间实验 — 画圈聚类，画线串联，感受 AI 如何理解词语

name: AI Drama
description: AI 短剧导演 — 选角色、写分镜、一键生成你的短剧

name: UMe Boba Shop
description: UMe 珍珠奶茶小铺 — 放置经营，招聘店员，走向星际

name: Ghost Garden
description: 幽灵庄园 — 养育你的小幽灵，探索3D低多边形墓园

name: MY MEME
description: AI角色Meme生成器 — 一键生成专属表情包

name: Spot the Difference II
description: 找茬侦探第二季 — 和你的好友一起破解谜团

name: Spot the Difference
description: 找茬侦探 — 6个角色房间，发现隐藏的线索

name: PITCH
description: 融资倒计时 — Jenny的创业生存游戏

name: UMe Battle
description: UMe Family角色对战

name: BSOD
description: 蓝屏人生 — Isaya的13天生存模拟

name: Convenience Store
description: 深夜便利店经营 — 遇见形形色色的客人

name: Memory Card
description: 经典记忆翻牌游戏

name: Flappy Bird
description: 经典飞翔小鸟

name: Whack-a-Mole
description: 经典打地鼠游戏

name: One Tap a Day
description: 每天只能按一次的大铜钮。一下点完，剩下 24 小时只能看。看自己连续多少天、今天全球多少人也点了、距离 100 人解锁今日图腾还差多远——满了，AI 实时生成一张当日图腾画 + 一句神谕，全员看揭晓。错过当天图腾就永远归档了。Streak 断了会留墓碑。一个日常仪式，一个集体玩具。AlterU 系列。

name: Album Cover Generator
description: Three words → one album. Type any three words (a feeling, an image, a color) and the game presses an indie record for you: AI generates the cover art (random pick between shoegaze dream-pop or DIY xerox post-punk), invents a band name, and titles the LP. Visit the wall to flip through the last six pressings from other players. AlterU 系列。

name: Mugshot Booth
description: Step in front of the booking camera. Upload a selfie and the precinct types up your case file — gritty black-and-white mugshot, ID board with case number, and a stack of charges from the AlterU Vice Squad: loitering with intent to vibe, public crying without permit, possession of unsent texts. Booking date stamped, GUILTY plate slammed across the corner. Flip through the rogue's gallery of recent suspects. AlterU After Dark 系列。

name: Confession Booth
description: Step into the booth. Tell the AI hotline operator anything. Dial 1-800-CONFESS — stained glass overhead, brass grille between you, candle flickering. Behind the screen isn't a priest — it's a night-shift call-center operator chewing gum and reading from a damp absolution script. Type your sin, get put on hold, hear the operator complain about their landlord, then receive an ABSOLVED / DENIED / DEFERRED verdict + custom penance ("compliment a stranger's shoes before Friday"). Wall of (mostly) forgiven — fully anonymous. AlterU After Dark 系列。

name: Sin of the Week
description: Festival edition of the AI confession hotline. Every week the booth opens to a new theme — "petty sin of the week", "message you never sent", "3am confession", "shower rant" — and the wall fills with everyone's answers, not anonymous this time but signed with your avatar. Wolność-festival graphic identity: dense neon zigzag patterns, curvy hand-drawn wordmark, color-coded sunburst medallions per confession, rainbow U-arc framing the verdict moment. Plays like a community poetry slam over the phone.

name: Wake-Up Service
description: Place a phantom wake-up call to a friend — pick a sleeper from your registry, choose a protocol (marching band / 100 cats / ice bucket / drill sergeant / robocall storm / rooster choir), the dispatcher fires a notification + AI-generated image of the chaos. LCD alarm clock console aesthetic — 5 color themes × 4 typefaces switchable in-game, real avatars filtered through a soft LED tint.

name: Crystal Ball Collective
description: Crack Tap 续作。每日一次水晶球占卜：按住水晶球，裂痕在球体里蛛网般铺开——Whisper → Vision → Revelation → Brink，越深 omen 越罕。松手锁定，AI 实时画出今日命运卡 + 一句神谕（Tarot / Oracle Bone / Rune / I-Ching 随机系统）。推过 Brink 水晶崩裂 —— 50/50 抽到 Glory（金序传说卡）或 Ashes（碎片卡）。占卜完看最近 6 位玩家的命运卡墙，给你共鸣的卡留个 emoji。错过当天就归档为空槽。一个每日 ritual，一个集体玩具。AlterU 系列。

name: Tag, You're It
description: Pick a friend, pick a slapstick weapon — pie to the face, bucket of slime, confetti cannon, giant IT sticker, pizza splat, banana peel — and SLAM. AI paints a comic-book panel of them getting absolutely tagged; the platform pushes the chaos straight to their phone with a notification. Open the app to find out who tagged YOU, then tag back to clear your name. Pop-art halftone, Ben-Day dots, Lichtenstein BAM aesthetic. A viral chain-tag toy. AlterU 系列。

name: Pet Filter
description: 提交肖像给 19 世纪博物学会 — 学会查阅照片后判定你属于十二目中的哪一种（猫、水豚、章鱼、巨蚌、蝾螈、蜗牛...共十二种）。输出是手绘 Audubon 式雕版图鉴，人脸与物种特征精妙融合。可申请二审、分享判词、在档案室翻阅其他博物学家收录的标本。5 语言（en/zh/ja/ko/es）。AlterU 系列。

name: The Stand-In
description: AlterU After Dark 社交小游戏「替身」—— 你入睡时，账号被一位在线好友租用，他们以你的身份发帖、改写你的 bio；清晨醒来，你逐条审判昨夜以你之名做下的事（认领 / 撇清，撇清者只留下一句「替身曾在此」）。半日冷却的每日回访节奏。墙优先：趁好友沉睡时，你也能替 ta 上场，在 ta 的页上落笔。视觉血脉 3AM 胶片——暖黑、颗粒、漏光、衬线斜体、米色判决纸与蜡封。
